head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to Minister Squiers.

div.p: Mr. Bacon says the President appreciates the prompt action taken by the Government of Panama and the determination to prevent further abuses by punishing those guilty of misconduct. Says orders will be given to pursue the usual course and also to keep a reserve ready to render assistance if necessary for the preservation of order. Adds that the President feels it to be important that action to determine the culpability of police officials charged, by judicial investigation, decision, and punishment, should be taken without delay.
